name: OPTICAL CABLE CORP
business: Optical Cable Corporation (OCC) manufactures fiber optic and copper data communication cabling and connectivity solutions. It sells primarily to enterprise, harsh environment, specialty, and wireless carrier markets. Products include cables, connectors, enclosures, and accessories.

exposures.sentence: OCC s product offerings include designs for uses ranging from enterprise networks, data centers, residential, campus and Passive Optical LAN (POL), stadium and other sporting event installations to customized products for harsh environments and specialty applications, including military, industrial, mining, petrochemical, renewable energy, distributed sensing, and broadcast applications.
OCC is internationally recognized for pioneering the design and production of fiber optic cables for the most demanding military field applications

OCC s product offerings include designs for uses ranging from enterprise networks, data centers, residential, campus and Passive Optical LAN (POL), stadium and other sporting event installations to customized products for harsh environments and specialty applications, including military, industrial, mining, petrochemical, renewable energy, distributed sensing, and broadcast applications.

OCC s product offerings include designs for uses ranging from enterprise networks, data centers, residential, campus and Passive Optical LAN (POL), stadium and other sporting event installations to customized products for harsh environments and specialty applications, including military, industrial, mining, petrochemical, renewable energy, distributed sensing, and broadcast applications.

OCC s product offerings include designs for uses ranging from enterprise networks, data centers, residential, campus and Passive Optical LAN (POL), stadium and other sporting event installations to customized products for harsh environments and specialty applications, including military, industrial, mining, petrochemical, renewable energy, distributed sensing, and broadcast applications.
OCC also manufactures and sells products in the wireless carrier market.

OCC products include fiber optic and copper cabling, hybrid cabling (which includes fiber optic and copper elements in a single cable), fiber optic and copper connectors, specialty fiber optic, copper and hybrid connectors, fiber optic and copper patch cords, pre-terminated fiber optic and copper cable trunks and assemblies, racks, cabinets, datacom enclosures, patch panels, face plates, multimedia boxes, fiber optic reels and accessories and other cable and connectivity management accessories

OCC s product offerings include designs for uses ranging from enterprise networks, data centers, residential, campus and Passive Optical LAN (POL), stadium and other sporting event installations to customized products for harsh environments and specialty applications, including military, industrial, mining, petrochemical, renewable energy, distributed sensing, and broadcast applications.

catalysts.sentence: On July 7, 2025, Optical Cable Corporation and Lightera, LLC (Lightera), part of the Furukawa Electric CompanyGroup, announced that OCC and Lightera had entered into a strategic collaboration agreement to expand product offerings and solutions especially for the data center and enterprise sectors.
